title: Peppery Crispy Saudi Arabian Haddock Kebabs
description: A lazy-Sunday Saudi Arabian dish featuring haddock, cooked to perfection using sous-vide for a low-fat and delicious meal. This recipe combines the freshness of the sea with the warmth of Saudi spices.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together black pepper, sumac, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and lemon juice.
Place each haddock fillet in a separate sous-vide bag and brush the spice mixture evenly over both sides of the fish.
Seal the bags and cook in the sous-vide machine for 30-40 minutes or until the fish reaches an internal temperature of 120°F (49°C).
While the fish is cooking, preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
Remove the fish from the sous-vide bags and place on the preheated skillet or griddle.
Brush the fish with olive oil and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side or until crispy and golden brown.
Thread the cooked fish onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
